item.title: Memory Card Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Recovery Program
(Utilities)
No need of technical guidance to operate Memory Card Recovery Program for retrieving deleted data items like songs, music file, pictures, snaps, text files, documents, video clips etc from virus contained Micro SD card. User friendly file restoration application is able to revive damaged data saved in different file extensions like doc, txt, png, jpg etc within short amount of time and money. Best data rescue utility supports multiple searching techniques like deep search, advance search, photo search, video search etc to revive crashed files and folders.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Recovery Program
(Utilities)
No need of technical guidance to operate Memory Card Recovery Program for retrieving deleted data items like songs, music file, pictures, snaps, text files, documents, video clips etc from virus contained Micro SD card. User friendly file restoration application is able to revive damaged data saved in different file extensions like doc, txt, png, jpg etc within short amount of time and money. Best data rescue utility supports multiple searching techniques like deep search, advance search, photo search, video search etc to revive crashed files and folders.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Memory Card Recovery Program
(Utilities)
No need of technical guidance to operate Memory Card Recovery Program for retrieving deleted data items like songs, music file, pictures, snaps, text files, documents, video clips etc from virus contained Micro SD card. User friendly file restoration application is able to revive damaged data saved in different file extensions like doc, txt, png, jpg etc within short amount of time and money. Best data rescue utility supports multiple searching techniques like deep search, advance search, photo search, video search etc to revive crashed files and folders.

[read more]

item.title: SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits [Security]
item.itunes:title: SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits [Security]
item.itunes:author: ssh-mitm
item.itunes:summary:
SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits
(Security)
ssh mitm server for security audits supporting public key authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits
(Security)
ssh mitm server for security audits supporting public key authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits
(Security)
ssh mitm server for security audits supporting public key authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]

item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow

GS DNS INJECTOR
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h2][color=#FF0000] GS DNS [/color][color=#008000] INJECTOR [/color][/h2]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b] COMBO [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1596767/]1.Game Graphic Unlicker [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]2.GSM ZRAM [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1596710/]3.GODSPEED MODE [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]

GS DNS Injector, developed by @revWhiteShadow, is a versatile and powerful module designed to enhance your DNS (Domain Name System) configuration. By utilizing this tool, you can effortlessly switch between various DNS servers such as OpenDNS, Google DNS, Norton DNS, Ads Blocker DNS, and Cloudflare DNS.

The GS DNS Injector empowers users to modify their DNS settings easily, providing an efficient means to enhance their internet browsing experience. By choosing different DNS servers, users can potentially optimize their network performance, improve security, and gain access to advanced features provided by these DNS providers.

This module also includes an ads blocker DNS feature, which can help reduce unwanted advertisements during web browsing sessions, enhancing overall user experience. By leveraging this functionality, users can enjoy a cleaner and more streamlined browsing environment.

Whether you seek improved speed, enhanced security, or targeted ad blocking capabilities, the GS DNS Injector developed by @revWhiteShadow is a valuable tool for DNS management, allowing you to effortlessly switch between popular DNS servers and customize your internet experience.
[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Visit website www.digitalcamerarecovery.org to download cost effective and professional Digital Camera Recovery application recovers lost or deleted memorable audio-video clipping, wedding album, photographs and other digital data from formatted or virus infected digital camera within short time period. Digital camera video restoration tool provides facility to scan entire digital camera using disk scanning feature that easily recovers lost enhance digicam data in any file format without any expert guidance in affordable and fastest way.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Visit website www.digitalcamerarecovery.org to download cost effective and professional Digital Camera Recovery application recovers lost or deleted memorable audio-video clipping, wedding album, photographs and other digital data from formatted or virus infected digital camera within short time period. Digital camera video restoration tool provides facility to scan entire digital camera using disk scanning feature that easily recovers lost enhance digicam data in any file format without any expert guidance in affordable and fastest way.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Visit website www.digitalcamerarecovery.org to download cost effective and professional Digital Camera Recovery application recovers lost or deleted memorable audio-video clipping, wedding album, photographs and other digital data from formatted or virus infected digital camera within short time period. Digital camera video restoration tool provides facility to scan entire digital camera using disk scanning feature that easily recovers lost enhance digicam data in any file format without any expert guidance in affordable and fastest way.

[read more]
